Class Date

java.lang.Object
util.Date
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Date>
public class Date extends Object implements Comparable<Date>

      public String toString()
      Defines how date object is printed with toString() method
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      project1.Date in format MM/DD/YYYY

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object other)
      Compares two date objects and checks if they're equal
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      other - project1.Date object to compare
      Returns:
      True if years, months, and days are same, false otherwise

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(Date o)
      Compares two date objects
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<Date>
      Parameters:
      o - the object to be compared.
      Returns:
      -1 if this.date comes before o.date, 1 if o.date comes before, 0 otherwise

    • isValid

      public boolean isValid()
      Checks if a date is valid
      Returns:
      True if date is valid, false otherwise

    • isTodayOrFuture

      public boolean isTodayOrFuture()
      Checks if date is today or in the future
      Returns:
      True if dob == today OR dob after today

    • isAtLeast16

      public boolean isAtLeast16()
      Checks if the age is valid
      Returns:
      True if age is valid; False if age is invalid
